brief: Execute acceptance work with the current project-specific knowledge focus. Goal: Summarize why repository bootstrap could not complete with live executors and record the next external actions required.

specialized_knowledge.summary: Verification strategy, seam-focused QA, regression checks, and acceptance closure.

constraints: base the closeout on captured executor evidence
avoid pretending bootstrap completed when external prerequisites are missing
acceptance: bootstrap blockers are captured in a local report
the report identifies the next external actions needed to retry bootstrap
